name: Coffee with Kristin - Phoenix Meet Up
location: Press Coffee Biltmore | 2390 E Camelback Rd
desc:
Hi Brianah and Emily!

I would love to get together with both you before you head out to your next assignments if we are able to find time. It's been fun working with both of you and while I'm sad that Nick moved on from Atlas, I'm really glad both of you joined my team. Below are some times I'm available through the end of next week. Please click on ANY that would work for you. I'll be able to see which dates we're all three available and I'll choose a time that works best. 

Looking forward to meeting you both in person! 

~ Kristin
